title: Yeastlicious Keto Bread
description: A herbal, dense, indulgent Turkish dish featuring yeast, this keto-friendly bread is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small loaf pan.
Mix almond flour, Greek yogurt, apple cider vinegar, ground flaxseed, and water in a mixing bowl until well combined. Stir in essential oil if using.
Pour the batter into prepared loaf pan and smooth top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool in the pan before removing to serve.
